goal: Add a side-effect-free PR receipt artifact importer that accepts supplied object or JSON-string artifacts and routes them through BPK-027 without reading files, calling GitHub, creating PRs, merging, or changing workflows.
scope_out: Do not read local artifact files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, change workflows, change package files, or mutate external state.
claims: PR receipt artifacts can be imported from supplied data without IO.
Imported artifacts flow through the existing receipt report.
Bad artifact shape blocks or requires review.
assumptions: A caller supplies artifact data explicitly.
Filesystem import can be a later, separately scoped block.
dod: Object and JSON-string artifacts are supported.
Invalid JSON blocks and bad receipts require review.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem artifact loading, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, workflow changes, or package changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-027 added a PR receipt intake report. BPK-031 may import supplied artifacts into that report without external IO.
